name: HubSpot CRM
description: Contacts, deals, companies, tickets, workflows via HubSpot's official MCP

env_vars.how_to_set: app.hubspot.com → Settings → Integrations → Private Apps → Create private app

tools.name: get_contact
tools.description: Retrieve a HubSpot contact by ID with all CRM properties and association data

contact_id.description: The HubSpot contact ID to retrieve

properties.description: List of property names to include in the response

tools.name: create_contact
tools.description: Create a new HubSpot contact with email, name, phone, and any custom CRM properties

email.description: Contact's email address (used as unique identifier)

tools.name: list_deals
tools.description: List CRM deals in HubSpot with optional filtering by pipeline, stage, or owner

stage_id.description: Filter deals by deal stage ID

limit.description: Maximum number of deals to return (max 100)

tools.name: update_deal
tools.description: Update properties of an existing HubSpot deal such as amount, stage, or close date

deal_id.description: The HubSpot deal ID to update

properties.description: Key-value map of deal properties to update (e.g. dealstage, amount, closedate)

tools.name: search_contacts
tools.description: Search HubSpot contacts using filter criteria on any CRM property with sorting support

query.description: Free-text search query matched against email, name, and company

filters.description: Array of filter group objects using HubSpot filter syntax

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (max 100)
